name: 陆姝仪

appearance.face: 温婉清丽，泪眼楚楚可怜
appearance.distinguishing_features: 粉衣下楚楚动人的柔弱姿态与清泉般泪眼

costume.typical_outfit: 粉色软烟罗长裙，娇弱风格

visual_reference: delicate beautiful young Chinese woman in pink ancient dress, gentle watery tearful eyes, pale fragile face, soft long flowing black hair, pitiful graceful expression, highly detailed realistic 8k
personality: 外柔内刚、心机深沉、善于示弱
desire: 获得安全依附与好姻缘
arc: 前世自杀陷害→今生设计失贞→道歉认错退出
scene_presence: 从提亲前后到满月宴承认重生，推动冲突
